label: C_Melanocyte
evidence: Reynolds et al. (2021) include melanocytes as a stromal cell type in the adult human skin atlas. The label 'C_Melanocyte' uses the 'C_' prefix convention for cell types starting with 'M' (to disambiguate from macrophages in file ordering). The cell is described as a melanocyte in reports and titles. Melanocytes are defined by expression of TYRP1, DCT, MLANA (MART-1), PMEL (gp100), and the master transcription factor MITF.
